entries.reasoning: Chose dual-layer enforcement: on-chain hard wall (smart contract) + agent-side middleware (UX optimization). On-chain layer is the security guarantee — middleware is convenience, not security.
entries.outcome: Architecture defined: AgentScopeModule.sol as Safe module + TypeScript middleware

entries.reasoning: Deterministic deployment using same deployer wallet + nonce across chains. Ensures same contract address on every network for unified developer experience.
entries.outcome: Deployed to 10 EVM testnets with address 0x0d0034c6AC4640463bf480cB07BE770b08Bef811

entries.reasoning: Created ASP-1 protocol specification (EIP-style) to position AgentScope as a standard, not just a product. Chain-agnostic design enables Solana implementation from same spec.
entries.outcome: ASP-1.md — 333 lines, covers interfaces, policy schema, enforcement rules

entries.input: Build natural language → JSON → calldata policy compiler
entries.output: compiler.ts — 851 lines, NL parser + JSON schema + calldata compiler + validator + summarizer

entries.reasoning: Venice.ai provides zero-retention inference — agent reasoning stays private while actions are public and auditable. Purchased $5 in credits via crypto payment.
entries.outcome: venice-demo.cjs running with live API key, demonstrates private reasoning → scoped execution

entries.input: Build Solana program (Anchor) from ASP-1 spec
entries.output: sdk/solana.ts — 392 lines, full EVM API parity. 17 tests passing.

entries.reasoning: ERC-8004 gives agents verifiable identity but uses hex IDs. ENS gives human-readable names. Bridge connects them — forward lookup, reverse lookup, trust scoring.

entries.input: Deploy to 4 Superchain testnets (Zora, Mode, Lisk, Metal L2)

entries.reasoning: Lido stETH Treasury bounty requires contract primitive where agent can only spend yield, not principal. AgentYieldVault.sol implements this with spending caps, daily limits, recipient whitelist, and emergency pause.
entries.outcome: AgentYieldVault.sol — 27 tests passing, deployed to Sepolia at 0xB55d7C3872d7ab121D3372E8A8e2A08609ce0150

checks: Agent cannot call withdrawPrincipal() — OnlyOwner modifier
availableYield() = totalBalance() - principalShares — principal is always subtracted
Emergency pause blocks all agent spending
entries.result: All 5 safety invariants verified via unit tests
